# Tensor Hacker

A notebook-first series on PyTorch, tensors, linear algebra, and ML systems.

## Chapters

1. [Chapter 1: Tensors, Shapes, and Views](notebooks/tensors_shapes_and_views.ipynb)

## What this series is about

This series explains PyTorch and ML systems from the tensor level upward: shapes, operations, linear algebra, implementation details, and practical mental models.
